title: New Zealand Government Cloud Services Security and Privacy Framework
description: Outlines New Zealand government requirements for public cloud adoption, including mandatory risk assessments, privacy compliance with the Privacy Act 2020, and governance considerations for State Service agencies. Details the Risk Discovery Tool with ~100 assessment questions covering data sovereignty, security, and incident response.
